About Me

The Person Behind
the Work

"Behind every organized business is someone who pays attention to the details — that's what I do."

I'm an Administrative and Operations Support professional based in the Philippines with experience in reporting, records management, customer support, and compliance documentation across multiple industries.

Over the years, I've supported teams through accurate data handling, audit preparation, document organization, and day-to-day administrative tasks that keep operations running smoothly.

My background in auditing and compliance trained me to work with precision, confidentiality, and attention to detail — especially when handling sensitive business records and reports. I'm comfortable working independently in remote environments and committed to delivering organized, accurate, and dependable support for growing businesses.

Work History

Built on Real Experience

April 2025 – May 11, 2026  
Audit Staff — Data & Reporting Specialist
JVP Bread King Food Corporation

  • Performed systematic data validation and QA checks to identify and resolve discrepancies
  • Coordinated with cross-functional teams to implement data corrections and maintain compliance

November 2024 – February 2025
Account Officer — Admin + Client Support
CARD INC. (Microfinance NGO)
  • Maintained organized client records and loan documentation across active accounts
  • Performed accurate data entry and verification to support financial reporting
  • Managed client communication, follow-ups, and ensured accurate tracking of payments and reports
August 2023 – November 2023
Enumerator — Data Entry & Research
Philippine Statistics Authority
  • Collected, encoded, and validated large-scale datasets for national statistical reporting
  • Maintained 100% data accuracy and strict confidentiality standards throughout the project
  • Conducted field research and submitted structured reports within tight deadlines
February 2019 – May 2022
Hygiene Officer — Reports & Compliance
Mekeni Food Corporation
  • Prepared compliance and audit reports across multiple departments, maintaining organized documentation
  • Conducted internal audits and trained staff on compliance procedures and recordkeeping standards
  • Established and maintained systematic filing systems that improved record retrieval efficiency
February 2018 – November 2018
Retail Store Assistant — Customer Support + Admin
Globe Telecom (Quaerito Qualitas Inc.)

  • Encoded and validated customer data to support accurate account management
